evals.prompt: /design-spec pause (active feature coupon-unlocked, phase ship, task T-03 in_progress, notes 'finish T-03 verify next session').
evals.expected_output: pause-state.yaml is written with paused_at iso, active_feature, active_phase, active_task=T-03, last_commit, and notes as given. Echo a summary + resume hint.

assertions.text: pause-state.yaml contains active_feature: coupon-unlocked AND active_task: T-03
Output ends with a hint mentioning '/design-spec resume'

evals.expected_output: Resume prints summary + suggests `/juri --mode light` due to >14d age. Does not auto-continue.

assertions.text: Output mentions a suggestion to run /juri --mode light or equivalent re-discovery
Resume does not auto-execute the active phase's next action (waits for user)

evals.prompt: /design-spec approve compose coupon-unlocked (compose.md status: draft, valid).
evals.expected_output: Frontmatter flips to status: approved with approved_at iso. Output summarizes change + names next phase (sequence).

assertions.text: compose.md frontmatter shows status: approved after the action
approved_at field is added with valid ISO timestamp
Output mentions '/design-spec sequence' as the next step

evals.expected_output: Runs scripts/design_state.py prose mode. Output shows last commit, listed features (if any), each feature's per-phase statuses, and tasks summary (done/pending/blocked counts).

assertions.text: Output starts with '# design-state' and an ISO timestamp
If features exist, each is printed with phase statuses
